message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
package "InstallInstalling" as InstallInstalling {
  [onCreate()]
}
package "PackageInstaller" as PackageInstaller {
  [createSession()]
}
package "PackageInstallerService" as PackageInstallerService {
  [createSession()]
}
package "InstallingAsyncTask" as InstallingAsyncTask {
  [doInBackground()]
  [openSession(sessionId)]
  [openWrite()]
  [doPostExecute()]
  [commit()]
  [installStage()]
}
package "PackageInstallerSession" as PackageInstallerSession {
  [Session]
}
package "Handler" as Handler {
  [handleMessage(MSG_COMMIT)]
}
package "mHandlerCallback" as mHandlerCallback {
  [handleCommit()]
}
package "PkMS" as PkMS {
  [sendMessage(INIT_COPY)]
  [processPendingInstall()]
  [processInstallRequestsAsync()]
  [installPackagesTracedLI()]
  [installPackagesLI()]
  [preparePackageLI()]
  [scanPackageTracedLI()]
  [commitPackagesLocked()]
  [commitReconciledScanResultLocked()]
  [commitPackageSettings()]
}
package "PkMS.PackageHandler" as PkMS.PackageHandler {
  [startCopy()]
}
package "PkMS.HandlerParams" as PkMS.HandlerParams {
  [handleStartCopy()]
  [handleReturnCode()]
}
package "PkMS.InstallParams" as PkMS.InstallParams {
  [handleCommit()]
}

InstallInstalling -> PackageInstaller : createSession()
PackageInstaller -> PackageInstallerService : createSession()
PackageInstallerService --> PackageInstaller : sessionId
PackageInstaller --> InstallInstalling : onCreate()
InstallInstalling -> InstallingAsyncTask : onResume()
InstallingAsyncTask --> InstallInstalling : execute()
InstallingAsyncTask -> InstallingAsyncTask : doInBackground()
InstallingAsyncTask -> PackageInstallerSession : openSession(sessionId)
PackageInstallerSession --> InstallingAsyncTask : Session
InstallingAsyncTask -> PackageInstallerSession : openWrite()
PackageInstallerSession --> InstallingAsyncTask : doPostExecute()
InstallingAsyncTask -> PackageInstallerSession : commit()
PackageInstallerSession -> Handler : sendToTarget(MSG_COMMIT)
Handler -> mHandlerCallback : handleMessage(MSG_COMMIT)
mHandlerCallback -> PackageInstallerSession : handleCommit()
PackageInstallerSession -> PackageInstallerSession : commitNonStagedLocked()
PackageInstallerSession -> PkMS : installStage()
PkMS -> PkMS.PackageHandler : sendMessage(INIT_COPY)
PkMS.PackageHandler -> PkMS.HandlerParams : startCopy()
PkMS.HandlerParams -> PkMS.InstallParams : handleStartCopy()
PkMS.InstallParams -> PkMS.HandlerParams : handleReturnCode()
PkMS.HandlerParams --> PkMS : processPendingInstall()
PkMS -> PkMS : processInstallRequestsAsync()
PkMS -> PkMS : installPackagesTracedLI()
PkMS -> PkMS : installPackagesLI()
PkMS -> PkMS : preparePackageLI()
PkMS -> PkMS : scanPackageTracedLI()
PkMS -> PkMS : commitPackagesLocked()
PkMS -> PkMS : commitReconciledScanResultLocked()
PkMS -> PkMS : commitPackageSettings()

@enduml
